findings.title: JWT tokens exposed in URL query params during OAuth callback
findings.issue: Tokens passed as URL query params are logged in server access logs and browser history
findings.suggestion: Use authorization code pattern or fragment-based redirect in a follow-up

findings.title: No state parameter validation in Google OAuth callback
findings.issue: State parameter used as redirect URL without allowlist validation — open redirect risk
findings.suggestion: Validate state against WEB_URL and ADMIN_URL allowlist

findings.title: refreshTokens throws generic Error instead of NestJS exception
findings.issue: Generic Error instead of UnauthorizedException; mitigated by controller catch

findings.title: Duplicate auth code across web and admin apps
findings.issue: auth.ts, auth-context.tsx, auth-guard.tsx nearly identical in both apps
findings.suggestion: Extract to shared package in follow-up increment
